description: Migration: create project_billing_configs table (tenant-scoped) with billing_model, total_price, currency, invoice_mode, contract_id, cap_amount, cap_behavior, cap_notify_thresholds, deposit_treatment, taxability fields

Migration: create project_billing_schedule_entries table with entry_type, description, amount, percentage, trigger_type, phase_id, trigger_date, status, ready_at, approved_by, invoice_id, invoice_charge_id
Migration: create project_phase_rate_overrides table with phase_id, service_id, rate, override_service_id
Migration: create project_billing_cap_usage table with billed_amount, written_down_amount, notified_thresholds
Migration: add completed_at timestamp (nullable) to project_phases
Migration: add project_id (nullable) to invoices for standalone project invoices
Register all four new tables in packages/db/src/lib/tenantTableMetadata.ts
DB constraint: schedule entry has exactly one of amount or percentage (CHECK)
DB constraint: one project_billing_configs row per project per tenant (UNIQUE)
DB constraint: schedule entry status limited to pending/ready/approved/invoiced/canceled (CHECK)
DB: FK from project_billing_schedule_entries.phase_id to project_phases with ON DELETE SET NULL semantics supporting manual-trigger fallback
DB: citus/EE migration parity for new tables (ee/server/migrations/citus) following existing conventions
Types: IProjectBillingConfig, IProjectBillingScheduleEntry, IProjectPhaseRateOverride, IProjectBillingCapUsage interfaces in packages/types
Types: ChargeType union extended with 'project_milestone' and 'project_deposit'
Types: project milestone/deposit charge variants carry project_id and schedule_entry_id
Types: time-based charge gains optional write_down_amount and write_down_reason ('project_cap')
Types: IProjectPhase gains completed_at; ProjectViewMode gains 'billing'
Zod validation schemas for billing config and schedule entry create/update payloads in packages/validation or colocated per convention
Model: projectBillingConfig.ts CRUD data access (tenant-scoped knex)
Model: projectBillingScheduleEntry.ts CRUD + status transition updates with optimistic guards (status precondition in WHERE)
Model: projectPhaseRateOverride.ts CRUD
Model: projectBillingCapUsage.ts read/increment with FOR UPDATE row locking helper
Model query: list ready schedule entries across projects for a tenant (Invoicing Hub queue) with project/client/trigger metadata
Model query: schedule + billed totals rollup per project (invoiced, ready, remaining) for budget bar and view
projectBillingService: computeEntryAmount (amount or percentage x total_price, cents-safe rounding with remainder assigned to final entry)
projectBillingService: schedule allocation validation (sum equals total_price; block final-entry approval when violated)
projectBillingService: readiness evaluation — phase-triggered entries flip pending→ready when phase completed_at set
projectBillingService: readiness evaluation — date-triggered entries flip pending→ready when trigger_date reached (scheduled job hook)
projectBillingService: cap math — remaining cap computation and per-charge write-down amounts including partial straddle
projectBillingService: threshold crossing detection with notified_thresholds dedupe
projectBillingService: deposit reconciliation — deduct_final reduces final milestone by prior deposits; credit treatment resolution
Action: createProjectBillingConfig with validation (currency matches client billing currency; model/mode enums)
Action: updateProjectBillingConfig — billing_model immutable once any entry invoiced; total_price edits re-validate schedule
Action: deleteProjectBillingConfig only when no invoiced entries exist
Action: create/update/delete schedule entries (pending entries editable; invoiced entries immutable)
Action: approveScheduleEntry (ready→approved) with RBAC and allocation validation on final entry
Action: approveAndInvoiceNow — approve then generateProjectInvoice for standalone-mode projects
Action/schema: holdScheduleEntry persists ready→held with reason and actor/timestamp audit fields; release restores held→ready without losing the original ready_at
Action: cancelScheduleEntry (any non-invoiced status→canceled)
Action: markEntryReady manual trigger (pending→ready for manual entries)
Action: bulk approve/hold for review queue rows
Action: phase rate override CRUD actions
Action: markPhaseComplete sets project_phases.completed_at and runs readiness evaluation for linked entries
Action: reopenPhase clears completed_at; linked ready (not yet approved) entries revert to pending
Action: getProjectBillingOverview — config + schedule + rollups + cap usage for the billing view in one call
Action: project cancellation hook — auto-cancel un-invoiced entries; flag deposit-exceeds-billed for reconciling entry
Engine: calculateProjectMilestoneCharges emits project_milestone charges from approved entries for the client (recurring mode) or target project (standalone)
Engine: calculateProjectDepositCharges emits project_deposit charges from approved deposit entries
Engine: recurring runs only pick up entries whose project invoice_mode is 'recurring'
Engine: fixed-price exclusion — time entries resolving to fixed_price projects excluded from calculateTimeBasedCharges
Engine: fixed-price exclusion applied to calculateUnresolvedNonContractCharges path as well
Engine: phase rate overrides — rate substitution for time entries in overridden phases (service filter honored)
Engine: phase rate overrides — service re-mapping via override_service_id before charge emission
Engine: hard cap — all project T&M labor and material charges share the cap and are written down so cumulative billed never exceeds cap_amount; partial straddle bills remainder
Engine: configured thresholds emit deduplicated notifications while every capped T&M project still enforces the shared hard cap
Engine: cap usage row locked FOR UPDATE inside invoice persistence transaction; billed/written-down amounts updated atomically
Engine: deduct_final deposit treatment — final milestone charge reduced by prior deposits at calculation time
Engine: passthrough guarantee — clients/projects without billing configs produce identical charges to pre-feature behavior
Engine: milestone/deposit charges taxable per config via existing TaxService distribution
invoiceGeneration: milestone/deposit charges persisted as invoice_charges; schedule entries stamped invoiced + invoice_id + invoice_charge_id in same transaction
invoiceGeneration: generateProjectInvoice(projectId, entryIds) standalone entry point producing invoices row with project_id
invoiceGeneration: standalone T&M project invoices include the project's uninvoiced approved time and materials
invoiceGeneration: deposit credit treatment — client credit created at finalization earmarked with project_id via creditActions
invoiceGeneration: project-earmarked credits drawn down by later invoices for that project through existing credit application
invoiceGeneration: un-finalize preserves project schedule linkage and cap consumption while the draft invoice exists; hard delete releases schedule entries and cap usage deltas
invoiceGeneration: recurring invoice groups project charges under a project-named section header via existing grouping
Invoice templates: project fields (name, number, phase) available as template variables for designer and PDF rendering
Event: PROJECT_MILESTONE_READY published when an entry flips to ready
Event: PROJECT_BUDGET_THRESHOLD_REACHED published once per threshold crossing (deduped)
Notification templates (email + in-app) for milestone ready, registered in notification settings
Notification templates (email + in-app) for budget threshold reached
recurringApprovalBlockers: warning (not block) for clients with ready entries older than 7 days
Invoicing Hub: Project Billing tab listing ready entries across projects (project, client, description, amount, trigger, days waiting)
Invoicing Hub: row actions Approve / Approve & invoice now / Hold / Cancel wired to actions
Invoicing Hub: bulk selection with bulk Approve/Hold
Invoicing Hub: Approve & invoice now only offered for standalone-mode projects
Invoicing Hub: tab badge count of ready entries
UI: ViewSwitcher gains Billing option; ProjectViewMode preference persists 'billing'
UI: Billing view replaces board area; phases panel remains; toolbar shows Billing heading + model/ready chips and hides task search/filters
UI: Billing view hidden from ViewSwitcher without billing RBAC permission
UI: enable-billing setup wizard (model, price or cap, invoice mode, optional contract link) shown when no config exists
UI: fixed-price payment schedule table — entries with description, trigger, %/$, status chips, invoice links
UI: schedule table allocation footer with sum-to-total validation state
UI: add/edit schedule entry dialog — amount XOR percentage, trigger picker (phase list / date / manual)
UI: Approve & invoice / Hold row actions on ready entries in the schedule table
UI: Mark ready action on manual pending entries
UI: T&M hard-cap configuration panel — cap amount and notification thresholds without a notify-only behavior toggle
UI: phase rate overrides editor (per phase: service filter, rate, service re-map)
UI: budget vs actual card — burn bar segmented invoiced/ready with threshold markers and write-down amount
UI: delivery economics card — hours at cost, labor+materials cost, projected margin
UI: deposit entries visually distinguished with treatment (credit vs deduct-final) noted
UI: billing_model immutability and total_price re-validation surfaced as clear errors in config editing
UI: entry with deleted linked phase flagged as fallen back to manual trigger
UI: ProjectInfo metadata row Billed: $X of $Y segmented bar (invoiced/ready) with tooltip, shown only when billing enabled
UI: phases panel $ milestone badges colored by linked entry status (invoiced/ready/pending)
UI: Mark phase complete action on phase header (kanban + list views)
UI: nudge chip on phase when all tasks reach closed statuses and phase not yet completed
UI: toast linking to the ready entry when completing a phase with a linked milestone
Client portal: read-only billing summary on project detail (schedule, statuses, invoiced-to-date)
Client portal: per-project client_portal_config.show_billing flag (default off) gates the summary
Client portal: show_billing toggle in the project's client portal configuration UI
Profitability: fixed-price project revenue = invoiced schedule entries; time excluded from revenue, included as cost
Profitability: T&M write-downs surfaced as a visible write-downs line
Accounting export: project_milestone and project_deposit charges map through existing item mapping with project reference metadata
Accounting export: deposit-as-credit follows existing credit transaction export treatment
RBAC: schedule approval/hold/cancel actions gated by existing billing invoice-generation permission set
RBAC: billing config and schedule CRUD actions permission-checked server-side (not just UI-hidden)
RBAC: markPhaseComplete allowed for project managers without billing permissions (readiness flows from it)
Schema/types: schedule entries persist requires_payment_before_work as an explicit boolean policy flag defaulting false
Service/action: derive payment-warning state from a flagged entry and its linked invoice without persisting duplicate payment state
Permissions: technicians without billing access receive only a generic required-payment warning while billing users may receive invoice metadata
UI: warning-only required-payment banner appears across project views and never disables work controls
UI: project task create/edit/detail surfaces show the generic required-payment warning
UI: time entry shows the generic warning after a flagged project task is selected without blocking submission
Lifecycle: remove the distributed-table transition trigger, prevent generic model status updates, and enforce a centralized atomic source-status transition map on PostgreSQL and Citus
Event: PROJECT_BUDGET_EXCEEDED publishes once when cumulative hard-cap write-down changes from zero to positive
Event: PROJECT_BILLING_SCHEDULE_STATUS_CHANGED covers supported schedule lifecycle transitions
Event: PROJECT_BILLING_CONFIG_CHANGED covers project billing configuration create/update/delete operations
Event: PROJECT_BILLING_PAYMENT_STATUS_CHANGED covers flagged invoice settlement, reversal, and replacement-needed states
Workflow catalog: all project-billing events have system catalog rows, payload schemas, and schema references
Notifications: first project budget overage produces localized email and internal notifications for project/account owners
UI: reusable billing-authorized invoice preview drawer opens from schedule invoice references and successful standalone generation without navigation
Client portal: project billing summary reuses client billing permission checks in addition to ownership and show_billing
Client portal: project totals and schedule amounts use the configured currency and ISO minor-unit rules instead of hardcoded USD
Economics: return and display tenant cost currency explicitly and withhold margin when project revenue and costs are not comparable
Actions: all public project-billing operations return standard structured action/permission errors for expected failures
Invoice lifecycle UI: unfinalize and bulk unfinalize display the safe underlying structured reason, identifying the failed invoice in bulk operations
Internationalization: project billing has genuine supported-locale translations and locale-aware currency/date/status/error/warning presentation with regenerated pseudo-locales
Policy: existing capped T&M configurations and new edits consistently enforce hard_cap while retaining configurable thresholds
RBAC: internal billed header, invoice metadata, and invoice drawer remain server-authorized by billing read access
UI: schedule entry editor exposes an explicit Payment required before continuing work checkbox for milestones and deposits
